text: That's right, Abhishek. Now major back-to-back resignations for the UK government. There major embarrassment for Boris Johnson. Now all these ministers from yesterday we saw Rishi Sunak resigning as the finance minister, top post minister in the Boris Johnson government. Now they're also putting out resignation letters, citing direct attacks on Boris Johnson's leadership. We have two more ministers now resigning again, yet again, citing scandals, saying responsible government ought to be responsible. But there was a party scandal, and then there was also sexual harassment allegations on the government, where ministers are now saying that the action taken was not really convenient to their leadership, so they're directly attacking here Boris Johnson and his leadership in all these open letters that have come. Now total of four ministers have resigned so far. Boris Johnson still maintains that he will remain the prime minister. No statement has come about these resignations that have now hit the Boris Johnson government. Abhishek.
